title: Loopress project configuration
description: Project-level config for the Loopress CLI (loopress.json).

rootDir.description: Base directory for all Loopress paths. All other path options are resolved relative to this directory.

snippets.description: Directory where code snippets are read from and written to, relative to rootDir.

styles.description: Directory where Global Styles files are read from and written to, relative to rootDir.

plugins.description: Pinned plugin versions. Keys are WordPress.org plugin slugs, values are version constraints.

additionalProperties.description: Version to pin. Use an exact version (e.g. "8.9.1") or "latest".
